metadata.feature_description: BCF-compliant saved views for BIM model navigation, with camera and clipping persisted separately from IFC entities and linked to reusable filter sets. A dedicated popup UI manages views, while cross-tab messaging applies view state and temporary ghost overrides in the main viewer without mutating saved records.

state.current_objective: Saved Views (BCF-compliant) feature implemented: DB migration, backend CRUD/aggregation, /views popup UI, cross-tab protocol, main-viewer execution, ghost mode. Filter-set save bug fixed (list endpoint now includes filter_sets; mutation error handling added).

execution_log.step: Validate BCF viewpoint payload contract and define canonical JSON schema mapping for bcf_camera_state.
Create and apply DB migration for app_views and view_filter_sets with referential integrity indexes.
Implement backend data-access layer for app_views CRUD and view_filter_sets attach/detach.
Implement GraphQL API for create/list/get/update/delete saved views with BCF validation.
Implement read aggregation: fetch_app_views_for_branch and fetch_app_view_with_filter_sets include linked filter sets.
Add backend tests for CRUD, filter-set joins, invalid BCF rejection, ghost non-persistence.
Create /views popup route with list, editor form, and filter-set attachment UI.
Implement cross-tab protocol (LOAD_VIEW, TOGGLE_GHOST_MODE) with cloneable payloads.
Wire main viewer to enforce one active view; LOAD_VIEW replaces camera/clipping/visibility and applies linked filter sets.
Implement ghost mode rendering override (opacity/desaturation) as transient in-memory state.
Fix filter-set save: extend fetch_app_views_for_branch to include filter_sets; add checkMutationError for urql.
Run verification: API tests, manual acceptance of camera, clipping, filter-set visibility, ghost mode.

handoff_notes: Lessons learned: list endpoints must explicitly load filter_sets; urql mutations require result.error checks.
